evidence.independent_review: Claude Opus 4.8 bridge review on 2026-07-06 found no blockers for Batch C; minor M22 orthography and reading-slug findings were fixed before sidecar refresh.
evidence.module_specific: M23 expands four Wikisource «Мудра дівчина» CC BY-SA page excerpts, kept shortened and on-site without claiming corpus completeness.
evidence.reading_remediation: Batch C replaces token-sized FOLK structured readings in M21-M24 with substantial learner-visible on-site shortened primary readings; external links remain supplementary.
evidence.rights_provenance: Each PrimaryReading has dash-led source/provenance attribution and an explicit rights decision; Mykhailyk stays commentary because the longer witness is not as rights-clean for on-site excerpting.
evidence.source_hygiene: Excerpts are verified against cited Wikisource/public sources, with no fabricated readings or unsupported source claims.
